nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: BACILLUS/BIFIDOBACTERIUM/LACTOBACILLUS/STREPTOCOCCUS THERMOPHILUS/GANODERMA LUCIDUM/PHELLINUS BAUMII/GRACILARIA VERRUCOSA/SACCHARINA JAPONICA/ULVA INTESTINALIS/UNDARIA PINNATIFIDA/(APPLE/GRAPE FRUIT/CHICORY ROOT) EXTRACT/CALCIUM OXIDE/RICE FERMENT EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: This is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the alga: Gracilaria verrucosa, Saccharina japonica, Ulva intestinalis, Undaria pinnatifida; the fungi: Ganoderma lucidum and Phellinus baumii; Malus Domestica Fruit Extract, Vitis Vinifera Fruit Extract, Calcium Oxide, and Oryza Sativa, by the microorganisms, Bacillus, Bifidobacterium, Lactobacillus , and Streptococcus thermophilus.
inciName: BACILLUS/BIFIDOBACTERIUM/LACTOBACILLUS/STREPTOCOCCUS THERMOPHILUS/GANODERMA LUCIDUM/PHELLINUS BAUMII/GRACILARIA VERRUCOSA/SACCHARINA JAPONICA/ULVA INTESTINALIS/UNDARIA PINNATIFIDA/(APPLE/GRAPE FRUIT/CHICORY ROOT) EXTRACT/CALCIUM OXIDE/RICE FERMENT EXTRACT
